column1: Xavier Edwards headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks, leading off at home with a steady bat and a clear platoon advantage against Kyle Freeland. His top-of-the-order role and favorable park conditions set the table for a strong shot at extending your streak. Right behind him, Jeremy Pena brings a similarly reliable profile, also batting leadoff at home and facing a lefty in Yusei Kikuchi, which only boosts his chances. Jacob Wilson and Luis Arraez round out the list with consistent contact skills and prime lineup spots, but Edwards and Pena stand out as the safest bets for a hit tonight.
